details: The scheme “Maths Wizard & Spelling Genius” is implemented under the Samagra Shiksha Programme by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to enhance the interest of Class 5 students in Mathematics and English by organizing competitions at the school, block, district, and state levels, and by encouraging students through rewards.
benefits: Under this scheme, to enhance the interest of Class 5 students in Mathematics and English, the Government of India organized the “Maths Wizard” and “Spelling Genius” competitions at the school, block, district, and state levels under AWP-B for the year 2023-24, wherein participating students were encouraged through rewards.
eligibility: The applicant must be a Class 5 student of a government school in Uttarakhand.

offline: The selection of beneficiaries for first, second, and third positions is done through school, block, district, and state-level competitions.

documents_required: Documents required as per the guidelines of the competitive examination.

faqs.question: Who is eligible to participate in this scheme?
faqs.answer: Students of Class 5 studying in government schools of Uttarakhand are eligible.

faqs.question: What is the main objective of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme aims to enhance students’ interest in Mathematics and English through organized competitions and reward-based encouragement.

faqs.question: Which subjects are covered under this scheme?
At what levels are the competitions organized?
faqs.answer: Competitions are organized at the school, block, district, and state levels.

faqs.question: How are students selected as winners?
faqs.answer: First, second, and third positions are selected at each level—school, block, district, and state—based on their performance in the competitions.

faqs.question: Is there any reward for participating students?
faqs.answer: Yes, students participating in competitions are encouraged and rewarded for their performance.

faqs.question: Are students from private schools eligible?
faqs.answer: No, only Class 5 students from government schools of Uttarakhand are eligible.
